# kvindo_gitlab_runner (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kvindo_gitlab_runner" "example" {
  id = "01abc123def456gh789012345"
}

output "info_state" {
  value = data.kvindo_gitlab_runner.example.status.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

- `name` (String)
